blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 38 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,146 ft. Looking ahead, 48 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 26" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 29.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 67".
